'''Palestro''' was a small time businessman that owned [[Palestro's Wholesale Firearms]]. He was a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cell on [[Wroona/Legends|Wroona]], and was known among Rebel agents as a friendly supplier of weapons.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-06-XX -->''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'' {{1stm}}
